data.body: STORY A a3d7 IMPLEMENTED + HELD-OUT VALIDATION PASSED. Implementer (held out from edges) built config wiring + server.py (create_app/serve) + serve CLI arm + [ui] extra; happy-path 6/6. Restored held-out oracle: 11/12 passed; 1 real gap CAUGHT — missing-extra guard only wrapped the server IMPORT, not serve()'s lazy uvicorn import. Fixed minimally (guard whole start-server op; catch web-dep ModuleNotFoundError incl name=None from block_extra fixture, re-raise unrelated). Now 17/17 green (incl test_audit_read). Teeth check: bypassing disabled-gate makes disabled test try to start a real server (hang) = gate is load-bearing. STORY F ff6f round-3 review = BLOCK again (6 precision findings: certified-indicator unverified; AC3 oracle vague; show_ticket AC path; code_review v1/v2 tolerance; operator-attested flag data path; four-pass uniformity on code-review). Will remediate comprehensively + re-review; pursuing story A to gates/commit/push meanwhile.
